title: North Africa Liberation
description: Quiz on the national liberation movements in North Africa, covering Egypt, Libya, Sudan, Morocco, Tunisia, and Algeria.

questions.question: In which year did Egypt become a British protectorate?
On what date did Britain issue a unilateral declaration of Egyptian independence?
Who led the Egyptian nationalist delegation that demanded an end to the British protectorate?
Which country gained independence on December 24, 1951 under UN Trusteeship?
The Egyptian Revolution of 1952 overthrew which king?
Which party led Tunisia to independence under Habib Bourguiba?
Who led the Algerian National Liberation Front (FLN)?
When did Algeria finally achieve independence?
What event in 1954 gave impetus to North African liberation movements?
options: The end of World War II
